title: nf-experiments pipeline parameters
description: A simple Nextflow pipeline that greets with multiple languages.

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define the input for the pipeline.

greetings.description: Comma-separated list of greetings to process.
greetings.help_text: Provide a comma-separated list of greeting words. Each word will be processed by the HELLO process individually.
